# Denis Diderot

*1713 – 1784 · French · [The Enlightenment](../movements/enlightenment.md)*

French philosopher and writer, chief editor of the Encyclopédie with [d'Alembert](../philosophers/d-alembert.md), a materialist mind and one of the great figures of the [Enlightenment](../movements/enlightenment.md).

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
